page_metadata.biotools__summary: Novel regularization scheme over multitask regression , which allows shared sparsity patterns for related inputs and outputs to be optimally estimated.  Such patterns capture multiple related single nucleotide polymorphisms (SNPs) that jointly influence multiple-related expression traits.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Novel regularization scheme over multitask regression , which allows shared sparsity patterns for related inputs and outputs to be optimally estimated.  Such patterns capture multiple related single nucleotide polymorphisms (SNPs) that jointly influence multiple-related expression traits.
